reviews.review_description: How to you create a new line (force a carriage return) please?  What is your support email address please?  Is there any reason why you didn't respond to the other, one and only, reviewer?  Always a bad sign when a developer doesn't respond!

The reason this app is perfect is that against all odds the developer has provided exactly what is needed and nothing more.  It’s an app which shows mature development decisions. It’s a simple text editor. Hook ups keyboard and type. You’re free to work how you want. The UI is clean. The dark mode looks good. There’s no subscription or nag screen or Y2K looking interface. It’s basically the perfect implementation of a notes app. 

Just one thing though. How do I export them?
